title: Search an element in an array

content.problemStatement:
You are given an array AAA of size NNN and an element XXX. Your task is to find whether the array AAA contains the element XXX or not.


Input Format

The first line contains two space-separated integers NNN and XXX ‚ÄĒ the size of array and the element to be searched.
The second line contains all the elements of array AAA


Output Format
Output "YES" if the element XXX is present in AAA, otherwise output "NO".
